zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hastings於1355年出生在英國諾福爾可艾爾辛時，她的父親Sir Hugh de Hastings19歲，母親Margaret Everingham24歲。她於大約1368年與John Wingfield在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年8月在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hastings于1355年出生在英国諾福爾可艾爾辛时，她的父亲Sir Hugh de Hastings19岁，母亲Margaret Everingham24岁。她于大约1368年与John Wingfield在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1397年8月在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hastings was born in 1355, in Elsing, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Hugh de Hastings, was 19 and her mother, Margaret Everingham, was 24. She married John Wingfield about 1368, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in August 1397, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Hastings est née en 1355, à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh de Hastings, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Everingham, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Wingfield environ 1368, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1397, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Hastings 1355 in Elsing, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh de Hastings 19 und ihre Mutter Margaret Everingham 24. Sie hat um 1368 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England John Wingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1397 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hastings è nata il nel 1355 nel Elsing, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh de Hastings, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaret Everingham, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Wingfield circa 1368, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1397, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Hastingsが1355年にイギリスノーフォルクエルシングで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Hastingsは19歳，母Margaret Everinghamは24歳であった。約1368年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでJohn Wingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年8月にイギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hastings(이)가 1355년 영국 노르폴크 엘징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Hastings(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Everingham(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1368년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 John Wingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.AUG 1387: de 9 de agosto de 1387 a 8 de setembro de 1387
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hastings nasceu em 1355, em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Hastings, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Everingham, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wingfield aproximadamente 1368, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1397, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hastings родилась в 1355 г. в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Hastings было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Everingham, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wingfield около 1368 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла август 1397 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
